description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The facade includes large rectangular windows and a prominent balcony or terrace area with a wooden floor, visible on the upper level. The exterior walls are primarily smooth and monochromatic, with a stark contrast between black and white surfaces. The main entryway is marked by a wooden door and is accessible from a recessed area, while the rear and side elevations are mostly solid with minimal window openings. The interior layout is partially visible, showing a staircase and open-plan rooms. The overall structure is compact and urban, suitable for dense city environments.
description: A modern, boxy house with a flat roof, large windows, and a prominent upper-level balcony. The exterior is a mix of black and white surfaces with a minimalist, urban design.
description_view_0: This view shows the front and side of the house, highlighting the large windows, balcony with wooden flooring, and the main entryway with a wooden door.
description_view_1: The rear view reveals a mostly solid white wall with minimal openings, emphasizing the house's privacy and modern aesthetic.
description_view_2: Another rear-side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid white exterior with very few architectural features or windows.
description_view_3: This side view displays additional windows, the balcony, and the secondary entry points, with more visible architectural details than the rear.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a wooden door, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
